annotations.justification: [1: Explicit Prompt Requirement] The prompt states 'Extract it into a named constant for better readability'. [4: Qualitative Requirement] Extracting complex inline queries into named constants improves code readability and maintainability. [5: Conclusion] Therefore, any correct answer must extract the inline tree query into a named constant.

title: 4.2: Removes or renames existing public exports from `common.ts` (such as qDotOrBraceExpr, qValueMatcher, storeInTokenMap)

annotations.description: Checks that the refactoring does not remove or rename any existing public exports from common.ts that other modules depend on.

annotations.justification: [2: Implicit Codebase Constraint] Other modules in the codebase import from common.ts.
